name: add_fastapi_crud
avoid: do not mix sync and async DB calls
brief_template:
To add a CRUD endpoint in FastAPI:
1. Define Pydantic models in models.py or schemas.py
2. Add SQLAlchemy model in models/ if using ORM
3. Create router in routers/ with GET/POST/PUT/DELETE
4. Use Depends() for DB session injection
5. Add tests with TestClient
